{"date":"2026-07-11T03:08:10.936107+00:00","transcription":"RQ3, session B, quiet one.
One: "The birch canoe slid on the smooth planks." Two: "Glue the sheet to the dark blue background." Three: "It's easy to tell the depth of a well." Four: "These days a chicken leg is a rare dish." Five: "Rice is often served in round bowls."
Six: "The juice of lemons makes fine punch."
Seven: "The box was thrown beside the parked truck." Eight: "The hogs were fed chopped corn and garbage."
Nine: "Four hours of steady work faced us."
Ten: "A large size in stockings is hard to sell."","transcriptions":[{"text":"RQ3, session B, quiet one.","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":3.39,"end":7.470000000000001,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:08:04.386000+00:00"},{"text":"One: "The birch canoe slid on the smooth planks." Two: "Glue the sheet to the dark blue background." Three: "It's easy to tell the depth of a well." Four: "These days a chicken leg is a rare dish." Five: "Rice is often served in round bowls."","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":10.23,"end":36.21,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:08:11.226000+00:00"},{"text":"Six: "The juice of lemons makes fine punch."","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":38.85,"end":42.09,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:08:39.846000+00:00"},{"text":"Seven: "The box was thrown beside the parked truck." Eight: "The hogs were fed chopped corn and garbage."","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":44.67,"end":53.97,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:08:45.666000+00:00"},{"text":"Nine: "Four hours of steady work faced us."","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":56.73,"end":60.39,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:08:57.726000+00:00"},{"text":"Ten: "A large size in stockings is hard to sell."","speaker":"Speaker 1","start":63.15,"end":67.47,"timestamp":"2026-07-11T03:09:04.146000+00:00"}]}
